title: Photorealistic Full Body Portrait Beautiful Young Woman
sourceTitle: Photorealistic Full Body Portrait Beautiful Young Woman
prompt: Photorealistic full-body portrait of a beautiful young woman with fair skin and light freckles, early 20s, striking blue-green eyes, subtle makeup with natural glow, long wavy reddish-brown hair styled in a messy high bun with loose strands framing her face. She is sitting elegantly on a round beige fabric ottoman in a modern minimalist living room, legs crossed with one bare foot extended forward. She wears a short, tight-fitting silver sequin halter mini dress with deep plunging neckline and cowl drape, multiple layered delicate silver necklaces with pendants, and a thin red beaded anklet on her right ankle. Her hands are clasped together resting on her knee. Soft natural lighting from the side, warm ambient light from a modern wall sconce in the background. Detailed realistic skin texture, fabric shimmer on sequins, shallow depth of field. Background features a neutral-toned sofa with a large white daisy-shaped pillow (green center), paneled walls, light wood flooring, and a small gold side table. Cinematic composition, highly detailed, 8k resolution, photorealistic, natural pose, elegant and confident expression with direct gaze slightly to the side Aspect ratio: 9:16.
